title: Meet our Cohort Leaders
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Meet our Cohort Leaders
Being a cohort leader means that I can contribute to the academic community I genuinely care about here at NYU Shanghai. I hope to support the PhD students by taking a leadership role to enhance our learning, research, and social experiences. I would also serve as a bridge for communication and bonding between different sectors of the university. Hope our team effort with other cohort leaders will make the PhD experience at NYU Shanghai unique and fun.
Being a cohort leader means that I can contribute to the academic community I genuinely care about here at NYU Shanghai. I hope to support the PhD students by taking a leadership role to enhance our learning, research, and social experiences. I would also serve as a bridge for communication and bonding between different sectors of the university. Hope our team effort with other cohort leaders will make the PhD experience at NYU Shanghai unique and fun.
I am deeply grateful to the NYU global community, especially NYU Shanghai, for fostering such a supportive, inclusive, and diverse environment that allows me to pursue my academic research with peace of mind. As a cohort leader, I am honored to actively contribute to this exceptional community. Its future relies on the efforts of each individual member, and I hope my presence will help make it a better place for everyone.
I am deeply grateful to the NYU global community, especially NYU Shanghai, for fostering such a supportive, inclusive, and diverse environment that allows me to pursue my academic research with peace of mind. As a cohort leader, I am honored to actively contribute to this exceptional community. Its future relies on the efforts of each individual member, and I hope my presence will help make it a better place for everyone.
As a fifth-year Ph.D. candidate in theoretical computer science, my journey has deepened my commitment to fostering a vibrant academic community at NYU Shanghai. I aspire to serve as a cohort leader to enhance communication and collaboration among all Ph.D. students, creating a supportive environment where we can navigate the complexities of our research journeys together. I believe that by bridging connections across our diverse fields of study, we can enrich our learning experiences and promote well-being while pursuing academic success. I look forward to working alongside my peers, learning from each other, and collectively making our Ph.D. experience not only intellectually fulfilling but also enjoyable and engaging.
